name: Waveform
description: Renders a waveform + spectrogram (and embedded cover art, if present) via media-extractor. Covers media-extractor's documented audio-format list, all confirmed as detecting a real audio/* MIME signature via file-type (verified directly for mp3, wav, flac, and m4a against real ffmpeg-encoded fixtures spanning three different container families; the rest — aiff/aif/aac/ogg/oga/wma/ape/wv/wavpack — are standard formats file-type recognises the same way, not independently re-verified one by one in this environment). Same extension-based-guess caveat as filmstrip/renderer.json applies here, symmetrically — see glue.js for how the two renderers hand off to one another once the extractor's own result confirms the actual kind.
